title: Healthcare Administrator
description: Manage operations of hospitals, clinics, or health departments to improve service delivery and patient outcomes

title: Public Health Analyst
description: Analyze population health data to inform policy, disease prevention, and health intervention programs

title: Clinical Research Coordinator
description: Manage clinical trials and research studies ensuring regulatory compliance and data integrity

title: UX Researcher
description: Conduct qualitative and quantitative user research to inform product design decisions

title: Content Strategist / Writer
description: Create and manage content strategies for brands, driving engagement through articles, videos, and social media

title: Education Specialist / Instructional Designer
description: Design curriculum and learning experiences for schools, universities, or corporate training programs

title: Policy Analyst
description: Research and evaluate government or organizational policies to provide recommendations for improvement

title: Social Impact / NGO Program Officer
description: Design and manage programs for nonprofits or development organizations targeting social change

title: Graphic Designer / Visual Designer
description: Create visual communications for brands, marketing campaigns, products, and digital media

title: Accountant / Auditor
description: Maintain financial records, prepare reports, and ensure compliance with accounting standards and tax regulations

title: Urban Planner
description: Plan land use, transportation, and community development projects to shape livable, sustainable cities

title: Economist / Economic Researcher
description: Apply economic theory and quantitative methods to analyze markets, policy impacts, and business decisions
